name: mta-fastify-workspace-root
description: Docker-only pnpm workspace root used by Dockerfile.fastify. COPY'd to /application/package.json at build time. See .bin/docker/pnpm-workspace.yaml for the member-package list. Lives under .bin/docker/ (not at repo root) so pnpm's directory walk-up cannot find it on the host — Makefile.lang.node's per-sibling install strategy stays uncontested. Generated by .bin/docker/regenerate.py — do not edit by hand.
